seoTitle: Build a Wix Website Using Only AI (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Learn how to build a full website in Wix using only the AI Site Generator, from a text prompt to a published site.
intro: Wix's AI Site Generator lets you describe your business in plain language and have the platform build a structured, styled website for you automatically. This guide covers interacting with the AI assistant, choosing a generated design direction, and using conversational commands to refine sections before publishing.

steps.heading: Launch the AI Site Generator
steps.body: From the Wix registration panel, start the AI website generator tool.

steps.heading: Describe your business
steps.body: Chat with the AI assistant about your business type, target audience, and the features you need.

steps.heading: Review the generated site map
steps.body: Look over the pages and features the AI proposes, and choose which ones to keep.

steps.heading: Adjust the visual theme
steps.body: Select font pairings and color accents through the conversational customization steps.

steps.heading: Generate the site
steps.body: Click Generate Site and let the AI build the structure and write initial copy for you.

steps.heading: Refine with the inline editor
steps.body: Use the AI section editor to regenerate or tweak specific blocks, check mobile view, and preview before publishing.

faq.question: Can I still edit the site manually after AI generates it?
faq.answer: Yes, once generated the site becomes a normal editable Wix site, and you can also use the inline AI editor for further conversational tweaks.

faq.question: Does the AI write the actual page copy?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI generation engine populates your site with custom copy, headlines, and graphics based on your described business.

faq.question: Do I need any design experience to use this method?
faq.answer: No, the process is built for non-technical users who want a working site without manually designing every section.

faq.question: Can I ask the AI to redo a specific section I don't like?
faq.answer: Yes, the inline AI section editor lets you request real-time regeneration or edits to individual content blocks.
